description: Staff Mobile Login - Add a discoverable staff login entry point on the main login page that uses the existing staff-credentials provider and redirects based on role.
steps: Add a 'Staff Login' link at the bottom of the OnboardingFlow component (components/onboarding/onboarding-flow.tsx). The link should be visible on the splash/name/phone steps as a small, non-intrusive text link (like 'Staff? Login here') that navigates to /staff-login. Follow the pattern used by the delivery login client help text ('Not a delivery partner? Customer login').

Create a new route at app/staff-login/page.tsx that: checks session and redirects staff to /admin, delivery partners to /delivery, customers to /dashboard. If not authenticated, renders a StaffLoginClient component. This page should be accessible without authentication (not behind middleware staff check).

Create components/auth/staff-login-client.tsx - a mobile-friendly staff login form using email + password that calls signIn('staff-credentials', { redirect: false }). After successful signIn, fetch the session and redirect based on role: DELIVERY_PARTNER -> /delivery, staff roles (ADMIN/OWNER/MANAGER/PACKING_STAFF/STAFF) -> /admin. Style it similarly to the delivery login page (emerald/primary gradient bg, card form, lucide icons). Include a 'Customer login' link back to /login.

Update middleware.ts to NOT block /staff-login route (it should be accessible to unauthenticated users). The current matcher already only protects /admin/:path*, /dashboard/:path*, /checkout/:path*, /delivery/:path*, and /api/:path*, so /staff-login should already be accessible. Verify this.
Ensure the login page's existing redirect logic (in app/login/page.tsx) still works: if already authenticated as staff, redirect to /admin; if delivery partner, to /delivery.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Staff? Login here' link is visible on the main login page (/login)
/staff-login route renders a mobile-friendly email/password login form
Successful staff login redirects to /admin for staff roles and /delivery for delivery partners
No new auth provider is created - reuses existing staff-credentials provider
findings: All verification passed (tsc, lint). Middleware already does not block /staff-login route. Used UserCog icon for the staff login link in OnboardingFlow. The link is only shown when step !== done to avoid cluttering the success screen.
